name: LoCoMo-Plus
capability_target: Cognitive conversational memory where latent user constraints must be applied despite cue-trigger semantic disconnect.

input_contract.metadata: official source card and constraint taxonomy
input_contract.context: private long conversations with latent constraints
input_contract.memory_system: VCM and non-VCM baselines under equal context budgets

output_contract.answer_accuracy: deterministic constraint-consistency match for private fixtures
output_contract.residuals: constraint miss, wrong latent bridge, false memory, or stale preference use

smoke_steps: verify repository license and metric determinism
block public payload staging until terms are admitted
contamination_policy: LoCoMo-Plus public conversations and constraints are calibration-only. Private analogues may mirror cue-trigger disconnect categories only.
regression_policy: If mastered, keep private cognitive-memory rows as regression and preserve public admission state separately.

permission_envelope.tools: local loaders, scorers, and report writers

teacher_role: No teacher solving or public conversation paraphrase generation.
